items.title: Retry decorators for flaky calls
items.description: Wrap model/API calls with @retry so transient rate-limit or timeout errors are retried with backoff, keeping call sites clean.

items.title: Latency and cost instrumentation
items.description: A @timed decorator records how long each model call takes; a similar wrapper can log token usage and cost per request.

items.title: Caching deterministic work
items.description: Use functools.lru_cache to memoize tokenization or embedding of identical text, cutting repeated compute and API spend.

items.title: Tool / route registration
items.description: Frameworks expose a @tool or @route decorator that registers a function so an agent or server can discover and dispatch to it.

items.title: Cross-cutting concerns
items.description: Authentication, input validation and structured logging can be applied uniformly across handlers via decorators instead of repeating boilerplate.
